name: Buyer Exhaustion into Fragile Ask
hypothesis: A buyer exhaustion signal (z-score > 3.0, predicting a drop) should be more effective when the ask-side book is fragile (highly concentrated at the BBO, ask_depth_concentration > 0.3). This state implies that once the BBO is consumed or pulled, there is little liquidity behind it to absorb further upward pressure, increasing the probability of a reversal.
mutation_note: Based on parent spec and 'add_filter' logic. This adds a book shape condition (high ask concentration) to the parent's trade flow signal, testing if a 'fragile' book state amplifies the exhaustion signal's predictive power.
